title: My Work Set to Show Items in a Defaulted Board View (Not the Main One with EVERY column)
excerpt:
We use a LOT of columns for various tracking and automation triggering purposes. Most of those are not applicable to someone going through workflows and so in the board view, we set a default view where they are hidden. 
…

posts.author: gcwozniak (Garrett)
posts.cookedHtml:
We use a LOT of columns for various tracking and automation triggering purposes. Most of those are not applicable to someone going through workflows and so in the board view, we set a default view where they are hidden.

That unfortunately does not have any impact on MY Work. Could this be improved?

posts.author: Sonya (Sonya Senkowsky)
posts.cookedHtml: I suggest this request be combined with one requested by Sara Swann here Ability to set defaults globally, specific use case for my Work

posts.author: Krunchy (Guillaume Servonnat)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have the same case.

I like the way we can see the selected items in My Work but i have some boards with a lot a useless columns for the employees working on this. And as we can not select the desired saved view, it is a bit useless.

I wish we could have the favorite view instead !
In my case,
